games.title: Donkey Kong Bananza
games.recommendation: My favorite game on the launch of Nintendo Switch 2. The base game is a blast, fun platforming and insanely creative levels. The DLC didn't quite hit the mark for me, but it was nice to revisit DK's island anyway.

games.title: Donkey Kong Bananza: DK Island & Emerald Rush
Mario Kart World
games.recommendation: A fresh take on Mario Kart that keeps the chaos alive. Perfect for quick races and 'friendly' competitions.

games.title: Super Mario Party Jamboree
games.recommendation: Party gaming at its best, tons of minigames and boards to keep the fun going with friends. Although I do not use the camera that much, it is fun what they did with the gameplay when camera is enabled.

games.title: Donkey Kong Country Series
games.recommendation: The best 2D platforming challenges on Switch.

games.title: Donkey Kong Country: Tropical Freeze
games.recommendation: One of the best 2D platformers. Incredible level design.

games.title: Donkey Kong Country Returns HD
games.recommendation: Classic DK remastered in HD. Challenging and rewarding.

games.title: Luigi's Mansion Series
games.recommendation: A delightfully spooky adventure series. Each one brings its own charm and puzzle-solving fun.

games.title: Luigi's Mansion 3
games.recommendation: The best Luigi's Mansion. Creative boss fights and co-op.

games.title: Super Mario Galaxy + Super Mario Galaxy 2
games.recommendation: Gravity-defying adventures that are just mind-bending in the best way. Extra hyped after seeing the new movie trailer!

games.title: Super Mario Bros. Wonder
games.recommendation: A breath of fresh air for 2D Mario. Creative and joyful.

games.title: New Super Mario Bros. U Deluxe
games.recommendation: Solid 2D platforming that's both challenging and satisfying. Great for when you want that classic Mario feel.

games.title: Super Mario Odyssey
games.recommendation: Pure joy in platformer form. Possessing enemies and exploring creative worlds never gets old.

games.title: Super Mario 3D World + Bowser's Fury
games.recommendation: A fantastic 3D Mario with an incredible bonus adventure.

games.title: Mario + Rabbids Kingdom Battle
games.recommendation: XCOM meets Mario. Surprisingly deep and strategic.

games.title: Super Mario Party
games.recommendation: Classic party fun with tons of minigames. Always reliable for a good time with friends. Although since I got Jamboree I stopped playing it as much.

games.title: Mario Kart 8 Deluxe + Booster Course Pass
games.recommendation: The definitive kart racing game. Really recommend the Booster Course Pass since adds great new tracks.

games.title: Mario Kart Live: Home Circuit
games.recommendation: AR Mario Kart in your living room. Creative concept.
